hook.summary: Introduction of a new 'Warrior' character class with stats and traits.
hook.visual_action: A 2D anime-style warrior character is displayed on a parchment-like background with skill icons and character details.
hook.text_overlay: Warrior, Personality: Mysterious and pround, Gift: 100% of affinity for pets, Tribe: Forest, NEW PROFESSION ONLINE, SSR

scene_flow: Introduction of the 'Warrior' character with a detailed stat sheet and personality traits.
Visual focus on the character's tribal design and idle animation.
Highlighting the 'SSR' rarity and the announcement of the new profession being online.
audience_proxy: Male gamers aged 18-35 who enjoy anime-style gacha RPGs and character progression.
